title: Long-form Essay Writing
description: Voice, structure over 5000 words, the recursive revision — the essayist's craft.
summary_pt_br: Ensaio longo: voz (lente, não estilo), estrutura (trançada, linear, circular), revisão recursiva.

scenes.subtitle_en: Voice, structure over 5000 words, the recursive revision — the essayist's craft.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Ensaio longo: voz (lente, não estilo), estrutura (trançada, linear, circular), revisão recursiva.

scenes.text_en: Voice, structure over 5000 words, the recursive revision — the essayist's craft. Focus: long-form essay writing. Voice is a lens, not a style — it decides what you see.
scenes.text_pt: Ensaio longo: voz (lente, não estilo), estrutura (trançada, linear, circular), revisão recursiva. Foco: long-form essay writing. Voz é lente, não estilo — decide o que você vê.

scenes.title: Long-form Essay Writing
scenes.body_en: Long-form craft: find your VOICE (lens, not style). Use STRUCTURE (braided, linear, circular). REVISE recursively — each pass with a different question. Kill your darlings.
scenes.body_pt: Ensaio longo: voz (lente, não estilo), estrutura (trançada, linear, circular), revisão recursiva.

examples.en: Voice is a lens, not a style — it decides what you see.
examples.pt: Voz é lente, não estilo — decide o que você vê.

examples.en: Braided structures weave three threads across one essay.
examples.pt: Estrutura trançada tece três fios num ensaio.

examples.en: Each revision pass asks a different question of the draft.
examples.pt: Cada revisão faz outra pergunta ao texto.

exercise.question: Complete: "Voice is a lens, not a style — it ___ what you see."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Voice is a lens, not a style — it decides what you see."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Voz é lente, não estilo — decide o que você vê.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Braided structures weave three threads across one essay.
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Braided structures weave three threads across one essay."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Estrutura trançada tece três fios num ensaio.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Long-form Essay Writing — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre long-form essay writing. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Zara, define voice in one sentence.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The lens that decides what you notice.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How many revision passes do you do?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: At least five, each asking different questions.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Cut the lines you love but don't serve.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: When changes become taste, not truth.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Long-form essays reward readers who read twice.

scenes.title: The essay workshop
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe three craft moves. Use at least three long-form terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At Zara's Saturday essay workshop, six writers gathered to discuss an 8,000-word piece that had taken its author an entire year.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: Voice is a lens, not a style — it decides what the writer sees, not how the sentences happen to sound.

paragraphs.speaker: Writer
paragraphs.en: I braided three threads — my grandmother's migration, the city's transformation, and my own return to that apartment.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: Your first revision pass asked 'what is this really about?' — the second asked where the reader gets lost.

paragraphs.speaker: Writer
paragraphs.en: Killing my darlings cost me fifteen sentences I loved — the essay is better without every one of them.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Long-form essays, Zara repeated, reward readers who are willing to read them twice — and writers who revise them five times.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Long-form Essay Writing". Voice, structure over 5000 words, the recursive revision — the essayist's craft. Voice is a lens, not a style — it decides what you see. Braided structures weave three threads across one essay. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Long-form Essay Writing". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Long-form Essay Writing".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Long-form Essay Writing".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
